item.title: SBU BS
item.description:
Choose your course by clicking on provided link:

  • Shahid Beheshti University:
    • 2015 - Spring (1393B)
      • Operating System Laboratory Prof. Tabatabaei Molazi
    • 2014 - Fall (1393A)
      • Operating Systems Prof. Ebrahimi Moghadam
    • 2013 - Spring (1392B)
      • Abstract State Machine Prof. Mahmoudi Aznaveh
      • Computer Networks Prof. Ghassemian
      • Operating Systems Prof. Ebrahimi Moghadam

      • Computer Architecture Prof. Safaei
      • Computer Networks Prof. Ghassemian

      • Abstract State Machine Prof. Mahmoudi Aznaveh
      • Advanced Programming Prof. Mahmoudi Aznaveh
